name: Unleashed Experiment
text: Dire – This character loses each other non-keyword ability. (This character is dire when it has no fate on it.)

name: Arrogant Kakita
text:
Pride.
Forced Reaction: After defenders are declared during a conflict in which this character is participating, initiate a [mil] duel – resolve the duel. If this character is the duel's loser, move it home. (Unlimited.)

name: An Agreeable Arrangement
text: Action: Give control of a (friendly) ready character with printed cost 2 or higher to an opponent. Choose a non-Champion character that opponent controls – bow the chosen character.

name: Solitary Hero
text:
This character cannot be evaded by the covert keyword.
Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating on your side alone – remove 1 fate from each other participating character with equal or lower [mil] skill.

name: Meticulous Scout
text:
Seeker role only.
Action: If you have gained 2 or more honor this phase, choose a province an opponent controls – place a dishonored status token on that province and reveal it, if able. While a province has a dishonored status token, treat its printed text box as if it were blank (except for Traits).

name: Yogo Junzo
text:
Dire – This character gains: "Action: Choose a character – discard all fate from that character."
Action: Choose a character you control – move any amount of fate from that character to your fate pool.

name: Iuchi Soulweaver
text: Dire – This character is considered to be participating in each conflict in which you control at least 1 other participating character. It does not bow as a result of conflict resolution in conflicts in which it is at home. (This character is dire when it has no fate on it.)

name: Untainted
text:
Attach to an unbroken province.
Reaction: After you win a conflict at attached province, choose a status token on a participating character or on attached province – discard the chosen status token and gain 1 honor.

name: Talented Performer
text: This character must be chosen as a target of each event if able.

name: Promising Youth
text: You may play this character as an attachment with the text: "Attached character gets +2 [mil] and +2 [pol]. Interrupt: When attached character leaves play – detach this attachment and turn it into a character."

name: Mushin no Shin
text: Interrupt: When the effects of a triggered ability would initiate, if that triggered ability chooses a character you control with 2 or more attachments as a target – cancel those effects.

name: Reconnaissance
text: Reaction: After the conflict phase begins, choose 3 provinces – look at each of those provinces (if it is facedown). If you have at least 5 more honor than an opponent, you may also discard any number of cards from those provinces.

name: Blessed By Fukurokojin
text: Attached character cannot receive dishonored status tokens.

name: Whispers of Power
text:
This card's fate cost can only be paid for with fate on characters you control.
Action: During a conflict, lose 1 honor. Choose a character – until the end of the conflict, that character gets +3 [pol] for each character with no fate your opponent controls.

name: The Skin of Fu Leng
text:
Attach to a unique character you control.
Restricted.
You may trigger each ability on each character with no fate on it as if you controlled that character. Each opponent cannot trigger those abilities.

name: Shadow Step
text:
Void role only.
Action: Choose a non-Mythic character you control – remove it from the game, then put it into play. If that character does not have the Shadow trait, it enters play dishonored.

name: The Western Wind
text: Action: Choose a non-stronghold province you control – search the top 8 cards of your dynasty deck for X characters and put them into the chosen province, where X is the number of faceup non-stronghold provinces an opponent controls. Shuffle.

name: Dark Resurrection
text:
Earth role only.
This card's fate cost can only be paid for with fate on characters you control.
Action: During a [mil] conflict, choose up to 3 characters, each with printed cost 3 or lower, in your dynasty discard pile – put those characters into play in the conflict dishonored.
